articles.value: Which Commander Themes Still Don't Have a Precon?
articles.excerpt: There will be close to 200 precons by the time the year's done, but there's still so much ground to cover, as Ciel identifies the themes in need.

articles.value: Fire and Ice: What Cards Are Hot and Cold for Oct. 24?
articles.excerpt: This week on Fire and Ice, we're looking at Narset, Enlightened Master and Minsc & Boo. See which cards are hot and cold for these decks.
